overview.description: Vietnam's pharma sector is growing with 200+ manufacturers and a $6B+ drug market. AI use cases span drug discovery support, clinical trial optimization, pharmacovigilance, and supply chain integrity.
overview.marketSizeVietnam: ~$6B pharmaceutical market; 60% of drugs imported; local generics growing
overview.marketSizeSEA: ~$40B pharma market; clinical trials shifting from China to SEA post-COVID

domainKnowledge.typicalDataVolume: Low to medium — structured clinical data; molecular data growing with local R&D
domainKnowledge.dataQuality: High for regulated clinical data; variable for adverse event monitoring

painPoints.problem: Drug discovery is slow and expensive; AI can accelerate compound screening
Clinical trial patient matching and enrollment is inefficient
Adverse event signal detection from pharmacovigilance data is manual

relatedNodes.description: Pharma and healthcare share clinical data and patient outcome modeling.
